trivia_bullets.text: Adventure card: Harvest Fear (3B sorcery — force opponent discard 2) + Reaper of Night (4/5 Specter — gains flying on attack if defending player has 2 or fewer cards in hand). Mechanical loop: use Adventure to empty hand, creature punishes the empty hand.
EDHREC rank 23,288 — niche casual card. Legal in Pauper and PauperCommander where 4/5 + built-in discard is more impactful. Not Pauper banned.

Artist Jeff Simpson. No flavor text on either face. Art features a spectral-bride figure fused into the wraith silhouette — distinctive compositional choice bridging gothic horror and fairy-tale mourning.
Typed Specter — a creature type with discard-punishment lineage stretching back to Hypnotic Specter (Alpha, 1993). Among the few Adventure-creature Specters in the game's history.

related_cards.note: Ancestral Specter discard creature; same mechanical archetype
